title: equisetum laevigatum f. scabrellum
intro: Equisetum laevigatum f. scabrellum, also known as rough horsetail, is a variant of the Equisetum laevigatum plant, which is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating urinary tract issues and skin conditions due to its high silica and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Equisetum laevigatum f. scabrellum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve kidney function, and boost the immune system. Equisetum laevigatum f. scabrellum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
